meaning: n.佛兰芒人(或译成佛拉芒人,比利时两个民族之一),说佛兰芒语的比利时人
examples: Sir Alexander Fleming did not, as legend would have it, look at the mold on a piece of cheese and get the idea for penicillin there and then.
Didn't Fleming know that Bond could not possibly be drinking a half bottle of Pol Roger?
Fleming writes there is a "serious risk" that data from incomplete studies will be misinterpreted.
That brought Fleming to the crease for the last time in his Test career.
